questions: music production er jonno ki ki lage
free music production software ki ache
answers: Music production is the process of creating, recording, mixing, and mastering music using digital audio workstations (DAWs), instruments, and audio effects. It covers everything from beatmaking to final mastering.
Music production holo music toiri kora — beat banano, record kora, mix kora, ar master kora. DAW software use kore computer eই shob kora jay.

To start music production, get a DAW (FL Studio, Ableton, Logic Pro, or free GarageBand/LMMS), learn basic music theory, watch tutorials, and start making beats. A good pair of headphones is essential.
Free options include GarageBand (Mac), LMMS, Cakewalk, and Audacity for recording. Popular paid DAWs are Ableton Live, FL Studio, and Logic Pro. Start with what you have and upgrade as you grow.
